briefs.title: Approved Screening Device and Motor Vehicle Act Regulations Amended — Effective February 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC amended the Approved Screening Device Regulation and Motor Vehicle Act Regulations effective February 1, 2026, updating provisions related to roadside screening and vehicle operation rules.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated Approved Screening Device Regulation and Motor Vehicle Act Regulations to ensure your operations remain compliant.

key_dates.label: BC Approved Screening Device & Motor Vehicle Act Regulations amendments take effect
